notes: Small, offline index of Metabolomics Workbench studies relevant to gut microbiome/metabolome topics (IDs + titles/contexts only).

records.title: Gut microbiome structure and metabolic activity in inflammatory bowel disease
A gut microbe-focused metabolomics pipeline enables mechanistic interrogation of microbiome metabolism.
The gut microbiota plays a central role to modulate the plasma metabolome in response to chronic Angiotensin II infusion (part-I)
Multi-omic analysis of the microbiome and metabolome in healthy subjects (blood)

records.note: Study ID mentioned in the linked paper's data availability statement; title not extracted from Metabolomics Workbench pages in this snapshot.

provenance.limitations: No raw metabolite matrices are bundled. The snapshot is metadata-only to respect usage constraints.
